channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Lead-turmeric-bangladesh
item.description: Source: TW The spice sellers’secret A hunt for the sources of lead poisoning in Bangladesh By Kris Newby Photography by Timothy Archibald Stephen Luby, MD, (left) and Jenna Forsyth, PhD, sought the causes of lead poisoning in pregnant women in Bangladesh. June 2, 2023 The rural areas of Bangladesh are quilted with verdant rice paddies nestled between glittering, blue river tributaries. Women wrapped in fuchsia, pomegranate-red and tangerine-orange saris walk among tan-and-brown cows.
